## Description

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? -->

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Tooling / CI

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this works? -->

- [ ] `composer lint` passes
- [ ] Verified the provider appears under Settings → AI (Connectors)
- [ ] Verified Settings → WebLLM loads the live model list
- [ ] Tested the in-browser worker (if the change touches the bridge)
- [ ] Tested in a WebGPU-capable browser

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the WordPress Coding Standards
- [ ] I added `@since` tags to new public methods
- [ ] I updated the documentation (README / CHANGELOG) where relevant
